hero.title: Hi, I'm Jose Miguel González
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer specialized in React, Node.js and cloud solutions. +4 years building scalable, high-performance applications.
experience.title: Professional Experience
exp_desc_agrimanager: Frontend development and maintenance. WebView for mobile app. New module development. REST API integration. Tech: React, TypeScript, Zustand.
exp_desc_astrolle: Micro Frontends architecture development with React. REST API implementation. Reusable components creation.
exp_desc_abc: Inventory management system with MERN stack. Authentication, CRUD, query optimization. Technical support and device maintenance.
exp_desc_alcaldia: Desktop application in Java for municipal asset management. Institutional web portal. Process automation. Technical support.
certifications.title: Certifications
projects.title: Projects
proj_fe_1_desc: Real-time inventory management system with React and Zustand.
proj_fe_2_desc: Web interface optimized for native mobile app integration.
proj_be_1_desc: Complete REST API with NestJS, TypeORM, JWT auth and PostgreSQL.
proj_be_2_desc: Backend with Express, MongoDB and JWT authentication for appointments.
proj_dev_1_desc: AWS services configuration with Docker, high availability and CI/CD.
about.title: About me
about.bio1: Results-oriented Full Stack Developer specialized in JavaScript, React and Node.js. +4 years building scalable, high-performance web applications.
about.bio2: Experience with REST APIs, modular architectures, databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL), Redux/Zustand, and AWS Solutions Architect certification.
about.bio3: Computer Science Technical Degree (UPTNM). Full Stack Developer from Soy Henry Bootcamp. Passionate about creating impactful solutions and teamwork.
meta.description: Jose Miguel González - Full Stack Developer specialized in React, Node.js, AWS. +4 years of experience in scalable applications.
